signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI confirms inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI confirms inflation at 2.16% YoY (up from 2.00% in Feb), with MoM rise of 0.34% | YES | HIGH confidence** [2][6]

South Korea's Statistics Korea released the **Consumer Price Index for March 2026** on April 2, 2026, showing headline **annual inflation at 2.16%**—a 0.16 percentage point increase from February's 2.00%—alongside a **0.34% month-on-month gain** (CPI at 118.8)
